persona.description: A decisive shopper who prioritizes fit and quality over price.

behavior_description: 0-2s: The shopper approaches the display and notices the product. 2-5s: The shopper leans toward a visible price placard, briefly points near it, then looks back at the product. 5-8s: The shopper's head and gaze clearly alternate between the product and the price placard. 8-10s: The shopper remains in place, again checks the price placard, and does not purchase.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper approaches the display and notices the product.
The shopper leans toward a visible price placard, briefly points near it, then looks back at the product.
The shopper's head and gaze clearly alternate between the product and the price placard.
The shopper remains in place, again checks the price placard, and does not purchase.

kling_prompt_sections.camera: 10-second realistic in-store medium shot from a salesperson-observable angle, three-quarter front or side-front view; customer face, gaze direction, subtle expression, upper body, hands, product display, and price area visible; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
kling_prompt_sections.scene: a home appliance showroom with wide aisles; visible product setup: two compact appliances on a display island with feature cards, plus clearly visible blank price placards positioned next to the products.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper approaches the display and notices the product.
The shopper leans toward a visible price placard, briefly points near it, then looks back at the product.
The shopper's head and gaze clearly alternate between the product and the price placard.
The shopper remains in place, again checks the price placard, and does not purchase.

kling_prompt_sections.negative: no back-only shot, no face hidden, no hands outside frame, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.

kling_prompt:
Camera: 10-second realistic in-store medium shot from a salesperson-observable angle, three-quarter front or side-front view; customer face, gaze direction, subtle expression, upper body, hands, product display, and price area visible; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
Scene: a home appliance showroom with wide aisles; visible product setup: two compact appliances on a display island with feature cards, plus clearly visible blank price placards positioned next to the products.
Customer behavior style: The shopper stays near the display and examines details with visible curiosity.
Behavior timeline:
- 0-2s: The shopper approaches the display and notices the product.
- 2-5s: The shopper leans toward a visible price placard, briefly points near it, then looks back at the product.
- 5-8s: The shopper's head and gaze clearly alternate between the product and the price placard.
- 8-10s: The shopper remains in place, again checks the price placard, and does not purchase.
Negative constraints: no back-only shot, no face hidden, no hands outside frame, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.
